title: Path Craft
description: Adds the ability to craft dirt paths from dirt blocks, making terrain customization easier
body:
# **Path Craft Datapack**  

*Transform your Minecraft landscapes with the Path Craft Datapack! This simple yet powerful tweak lets you craft dirt paths effortlessly, making it easier than ever to shape and customize your world.*  

## **Crafting Recipe Example:**  
**2 Dirt Blocks = 1 Dirt Path**  

![Path craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3744179ba983b58399c0274b33f795ec1d05849.png)

### **How to Use:**  
1. Download the Path Craft Datapack.  
2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world save.  
3. Start crafting and create natural, winding paths with ease!  

### **Compatibility:**  
- Works seamlessly with other datapacks.  
- No additional dependencies required.  

### **Shape Your World:**  
Whether you're building cozy villages or scenic trails, the Path Craft Datapack makes landscaping more accessible. Say goodbye to shovels – now you can craft and place dirt paths with ease.  

**Download Path Craft now and carve out your perfect Minecraft journey!**
